subject: FW: Pair of 19th Century Medici Style Lions
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Mark Green [mailto:mg@beauxcaesar.com] 
Sent: Thursday, May 08, 2008 12:09 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Pair of 19th Century Medici Style Lions

Dear Mr Epstein,

Please find attached images and details of:

A PAIR OF 19TH CENTURY SICILIAN MARBLE LIONS MODELLED ON A PAIR OF LIONS BELONGING TO THE MEDICI FAMILY, FLORENCE.

PROVENANCE: JOSEPH MILLER HUSTON
            OAKES CLOISTER
            USA

£185,000=

Look forward to your comments.

Kind regards,

Yours sincerely,

Mark Green.

NB. Overleaf is an image of a 17th century marble bust of King David



Beaux Caesar
18th & 19th Century Fine Furniture and Objects
19 Shepherd Market, London W1J 7PJ
Tel: +44(0)20 7493 3315
Mobile: +44(0) 7792 905158
www.beauxcaesar.com
